digest.greeting: Thursday, June 11, Jean. Outlook shows 8 working-day calendar blocks, with the main operating window running from the 10:30 AM Andrea 1:1 through the 4:00 PM Tudo Bem weekly meeting; the Jean/Sara 1:1 and BCP/Incident Response are the day’s strongest prep anchors. There are 0 carried-over items from the prior daily digest after applying GitHub completion state, no active reminders, and the highest-priority live items are the I-693 FAQ access-request cluster, Nadia’s Phase 2 reply, and Sara’s EPMO timeline-accountability KPI thread. Teams recent-thread discovery still returned a Microsoft Graph 403, so Teams context is limited to targeted search plus readable unread chat metadata.

sections.title: Today's Schedule
sections.note: Times shown in Jean's Outlook working timezone. The day is meeting-heavy from 10:30 AM to 3:00 PM, then has one focus block before Tudo Bem.

items.label: 1:1 Andrea and Jean
items.detail: Regular 1:1 with Andrea. Use for Staff Aug, TRACE, Send Letters, or other Andrea-owned project threads that need owner clarity before tomorrow's Phase 2 block.

items.label: Jean/Sara 1:1
items.detail: Sara restarted the weekly 1:1 series. Strong prep anchor for EPMO KPI direction, timeline accountability, and any escalation or priority tradeoff Jean needs to settle with Sara.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Ninety-minute protected block. Best use is clearing the I-693 access requests, reviewing Nadia's Phase 2 reply, and preparing the BCP/Incident Response and afternoon 1:1 sequence.

items.label: Weekly Meeting: BCP/Incident Response
items.detail: Tessa and Stephanie declined; Larry, Lucia, Dan, Sarah, Santiago, Angelica, and others are on the invite. Use for Incident Response ownership, timeline, or blocker follow-up if any risk remains open.

items.label: 1:1 Camilo & Jean
items.detail: Regular 1:1 with Camilo. Useful for any team capacity, leave, or portfolio-status questions that need a direct check-in.

items.label: 1:1 Maria & Jean
items.detail: Agenda explicitly lists portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps. Bring only the items that need a decision or a named next owner.

items.label: Focus time
items.detail: One-hour cleanup block before Tudo Bem. Best use is converting meeting outcomes into dashboard updates and closing email-driven approvals.

items.label: Tudo Bem!'s Weekly Meeting
items.detail: Main team forum for project progress, roadblocks, shared learning, and any follow-through from today's 1:1 stack or BCP/Incident Response discussion.

items.label: Resolve I-693 FAQ access requests
items.detail: Action type: decide/approve. Outlook shows three unread SharePoint access requests for the I-693 FAQ for Client Facing Teams from Juanita Arrieta Salguero, Alondra Gotay, and Carol Alarcon between 4:53 PM and 5:15 PM on June 10. Decide whether to approve or decline the document access before the requests stale.

items.label: Review Nadia's Phase 2 Projects reply
items.detail: Action type: review/follow up. Nadia replied to the Phase 2 Projects thread yesterday evening; the visible preview references the HR ticketing system being pushed back from Saltclick plus intake or billing-related initiatives. Use the thread to decide what needs to be routed into tomorrow's Phase 2 Weekly IT Projects Sync.

items.label: Align with Sara on the timeline KPI
items.detail: Action type: review/decide. In EPMO Liderazgo, Sara shared the final Timeline Stewardship & Schedule Accountability KPI and the EPMO_KPIs workbook, after asking for thoughts before Jon's feedback. Use the Jean/Sara 1:1 to confirm whether Jean has concerns before the KPI becomes operational guidance.

items.label: Prepare the BCP/IR and portfolio 1:1 sequence
items.detail: Action type: prepare. The 1:30 PM BCP/Incident Response meeting runs directly into Camilo and Maria 1:1s. Bring a short list of blockers, ownership questions, and next-step decisions so the compressed afternoon does not become only status.

items.label: Decide whether deleted recordings matter
items.detail: Action type: decide. Outlook has new SharePoint deletion notices for the Staff Augmentation weekly touchpoint and Venn Training recordings. Restore only if either recording is needed for active Staff Aug, TRACE, or tool-support context; otherwise leave them archived.

items.label: Three I-693 FAQ access requests are waiting
items.detail: Unread SharePoint requests from Juanita Arrieta Salguero, Alondra Gotay, and Carol Alarcon all ask for access to the same I-693 FAQ for Client Facing Teams resource. Action type: approve/decline. Treat as one access-control decision rather than three separate tasks.

items.label: Nadia replied on Phase 2 Projects
items.detail: Unread from Nadia Wilson at 5:35 PM on June 10. Action type: review/follow up. The preview references HR ticketing-system pushback from Saltclick plus intake or billing-related initiatives, making it relevant to tomorrow's Phase 2 and CoE planning blocks.

items.label: Staff Aug and Venn recordings were deleted after expiration
items.detail: Unread SharePoint notices this morning say the Staff Augmentation weekly touchpoint and Venn Training recordings were deleted after expiration. Action type: decide. Restore only if the material is still needed for current project or training context.

items.label: Sara shared the Timeline Stewardship KPI
items.detail: Action type: review/decide. EPMO Liderazgo shows Sara posted the final Timeline Stewardship & Schedule Accountability KPI and linked the EPMO_KPIs workbook. The content is concrete enough to affect PM expectations, so Jean should flag any concerns early.

items.label: Confirm EPMO offer and recognition loose ends
items.detail: Action type: follow up. EPMO Liderazgo shows Sara said to move forward ASAP with offers after Jean shared Astrid's manager feedback, while Janet separately flagged a missing recognition slide for Jean and Gustavo. Confirm whether either needs Jean's input today.

items.label: TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint
items.detail: Short 15-minute touchpoint with Yuri. Good place to close Staff Aug/TRACE deltas before the larger Phase 2 sync.

items.label: Phase 2 Weekly IT Projects Sync
items.detail: Primary Friday anchor. Jhara declined, while Yuri, Andrea, Mar, David, Santiago, Anu, and others are listed. Bring Nadia's Phase 2 reply and any Saltclick/intake/billing implications.

items.label: CoE Sync Jean
items.detail: Mar-organized CoE sync with Jean and David. Useful follow-through for CoE intake, ownership, and project routing decisions.

items.label: EPMO EOW Check In
items.detail: Sara moved this earlier and added Nadia for programmatic updates. Good forum for the Phase 2/Nadia thread if it needs leadership visibility.

items.label: Executive Project Status Slide Update
items.detail: Weekly executive-project deck update with Yuri, Jhara, and Mar. The linked deck is explicitly referenced in the invite.
